data.title: Project Summary
data.markdown:
# 🚀 AI-Powered Recruitment Pipeline

## Architecture
- **Backend**: Node.js + Express + SQLite + GraphQL (Apollo)
- **Frontend**: React + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS
- **AI Engine**: Gemini Pro for resume evaluation
- **Real-time**: Socket.IO for live updates
- **Workspace**: Jetro canvas for visual analytics

## Key Features
- PDF resume parsing & AI-powered evaluation
- Multi-dimensional scoring (Skill, Experience, Culture, Risk)
- Real-time WebSocket notifications
- GraphQL API for flexible queries
- Role-based auth with JWT
- Audit logging

## Data Pipeline
`Resume Upload → Text Extraction → AI Scoring → Ranking → Dashboard`

data.title: Jetro Integration Details
data.markdown:
# 🧰 Jetro Workspace Features Used

## Canvas Elements
- **5 Interactive Frames** — KPI dashboard, rankings table, score charts, pipeline funnel, skills heatmap
- **2 Research Notes** — Project documentation and tech details

## Data Layer
- SQLite database with 6 tables (users, jobs, candidates, evaluations, audit_logs, notes)
- Custom data connector for recruitment API
- DuckDB cache integration

## Live Refresh
- Python refresh scripts bound to frames
- Auto-updating candidate rankings
- Real-time pipeline metrics

## Project Structure
- Organized under `projects/recruitment_pipeline/`
- Scoped canvas, notes, and sources
- Custom connectors at `.jetro/connectors/`
